settings.deleteAssociatedHomes: All associated homes will be deleted

support.title: Technical Support
support.subject: Subject
support.subtitle: Manage your help requests and questions
support.createSupportTicketDesc: Describe your issue or question and we will help you as soon as possible
support.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your issue or question with as much detail as possible...

sample.deviceDisconnectedDesc: The kitchen sensor has not connected for 2 days
sample.monthlyReportErrorDesc: The September report is not generated correctly
sample.problemIdentified: We identified the issue. We are working on the solution.
sample.ratesQuestionDesc: How can I configure different rates for each home?
sample.ratesAnswer: You can configure different rates from Settings > Rates. Select each home and assign the corresponding rate.
sample.undetectedLeakDesc: I had a leak in the bathroom but the system did not detect it
sample.calibrationReview: We will review the sensor calibration. Could you share the device code?
sample.visitScheduled: Thank you. We scheduled a technical visit to review the sensor.

homes.title: My Homes
homes.subtitle: Manage your registered properties and homes

homes.selectHomeToAdd: Select the home you want to add the member to
homes.deleteHomeDesc: This action will permanently delete the home and all its associated data (members, devices, etc.). This action cannot be undone.
homes.homeDeletedDesc: The home and all its data have been deleted
homes.deleteMemberDesc: The member will be permanently removed from the home. This action cannot be undone.
homes.memberDeletedDesc: The member has been removed from the home
homes.deleteDeviceDesc: The device will be permanently removed from the system. You will lose all historical data from this sensor. This action cannot be undone.
homes.deviceDeletedDesc: The device has been removed from the system
homes.memberReadOnlyAlert: You are a member of this home. Only the administrator can make changes.
homes.userHomeManagementDesc: Manage users and their memberships across different homes
homes.membersReadOnlyAlert: You can only view members. To add or remove members, you must be an administrator of this home.
homes.removeMemberConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{userName}} from this home? The user will still exist in other homes.
homes.noMembersInHome: There are no members in this home
homes.addMemberLongDesc: Create a new user or add an existing one to the home. If the email already exists, it will be added to the home.
